transformations.name: Missing values
transformations.description: Removed records with null values in any column
transformations.justification: Nulls represented less than 4% of total; removal avoids introducing assumptions

transformations.name: Invalid ages
transformations.description: Removed negative ages and ages > 120 years
transformations.justification: Clinically impossible values, suggest data entry errors

transformations.name: Date standardization
transformations.description: Converted all dates to datetime format (YYYY-MM-DD)

transformations.name: Outlier removal
transformations.description: Removed 40 multivariate outliers using Mahalanobis distance (cutoff=0.995)
transformations.justification: Multivariate outliers could distort the model. Heart rate outliers were retained due to potential clinical relevance.
